list.heroDescription: Explore our integrated STEM curriculums, designed to inspire and foster creativity in learning. Each curriculum offers a comprehensive learning pathway, combining STEM subjects with hands-on activities and real-world explorations. From developing critical thinking skills to promoting collaboration, our curriculums aim to equip students with the tools they need to succeed in the modern world.
list.title: Curriculums List
list.noDataDetail: Try changing the search term or filters to find relevant curriculums.
list.error: An error occurred while fetching curriculums. Please try again.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: e.g: This curriculum includes critical thinking and creativity skills for children

custom.courseListDescription: You will have access to a full range of lessons, activities and explorations as well as different ways to navigate through it, highlighting different learning strategies and expected outcomes you can directly distribute to students via Stemify Classroom.
custom.kitListDescription: Each curriculum is designed to be used with a specific Stemify Kit, which includes all the necessary materials and components for hands-on learning and exploration. The kit provides a comprehensive set of tools and resources that align with the curriculum's learning objectives, allowing students to engage in interactive and experiential learning activities.
custom.searchCoursePlaceholder: Search courses by code or title...
custom.emulatorListDescription: Emulators provide a virtual environment that mimics the behavior of physical devices, allowing users to test and run software applications without the need for actual hardware. They are commonly used in software development, testing, and debugging processes, enabling developers to simulate different device configurations and operating systems.
